items.title: Bhuvneshwar: Enjoyed the six more than four wickets
items.summary: With nine needed from three balls, Bhuvneshwar scythed Raj Bawa over deep cover for six, paving the way for a memorable RCB win
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: NBA Mock Draft: With 2026 lottery now set, AJ Dybantsa goes No. 1 to Wizards, Darryn Peterson No. 2 to Jazz
items.summary: Adam Finkelstein's first mock draft after the NBA Draft Lottery set the order for the first 14 picks
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Barcelona v Real Madrid: La Liga title on the line in clásico – live
items.summary: ⚽ Barça will win La Liga with a point from 8pm BST kick-off ⚽ Live scores | Follow us over on Bluesky | And email John Pictures emerging of a fan in the stand with a Jose Mourin...
